title: athyrium elongatum
intro: Athyrium elongatum, also known as Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus, characterized by its elongated fronds and delicate appearance. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The Lady Fern is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Athyrium elongatum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support respiratory health and promote overall well-being.
